title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Simplilearn South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Simplilearn South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Simplilearn South Asia Partners in Visakhapatnam offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Simplilearn South Asia Partners:
Simplilearn South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn South Asia Partners!
